milestone_brief:
Fill the VARIETY_DEFAULT_COLOR: dict[str, str] = {} stub at styles.py:99-107 (placeholder reserved for UPL-5, the original uplift's id; this milestone is its execution). Source: .claude/notes/frontend-uplifts/2026q2-graph-and-window/artifacts/final-report.md UPL-2; challenger MINOR at .claude/notes/frontend-uplifts/2026q2-graph-and-window/artifacts/challenge.md.

Scope:

1. styles.py — Add 4 dict entries to VARIETY_DEFAULT_COLOR, one per variety family. Keys MUST match surfaces.py VARIETIES dict VERBATIM (the existing comment at styles.py:102 enforces this). The 4 families are: 'K3 surface', 'Enriques surface', 'Calabi-Yau 3-fold', 'Fano 3-fold (ρ=1)'. Hex values must:
(a) be 6-digit hex (AI-13);
(b) pass WCAG 4.5:1 against BG_VIEWPORT=#2f2f2f — the surface name appears in the status bar in this color, so it IS text contrast, not just non-text. The challenger's MINOR specifically called out that #5e7fb8 fails (3.4:1) and #b89878 is borderline (4.5:1). Re-audit and lighten.
(c) be distinguishable from each other under typical viewing conditions (a researcher switching K3 → Enriques → CY3 → Fano should see a clear hue change, not three-shades-of-blue);
(d) feel research-credible — restrained scientific palette, not marketing-grade saturation. 3Blue1Brown / Quanta-magazine register.

Suggested starting palette from the synthesis (re-audit per b):
K3: #7a92b8 (cool slate) — marginal at 4.7:1, may need to lighten
Enriques: #b89878 → consider #c4a888 (warm amber)
CY3: #5e7fb8 → MUST lighten to e.g. #7a96c8 or #8aa5d2 (cobalt; Elegant Universe register)
Fano: #7ba872 (mathematical green) — marginal at 3.7:1, lighten

Final selection is the researcher's call subject to (a)-(d).

2. appearance_panel.py — Add a public method set_default_color(hex_str) on AppearancePanel that sets self._surface_color and refreshes the swatch. Wire app.py to call this on variety/subtype switch (in _on_variety_changed / _on_subtype_changed handlers) with VARIETY_DEFAULT_COLOR.get(variety_key, BG_SURFACE_DEFAULT). User override via the existing 'Surface...' color swatch still wins — the per-variety default only applies on switch, not on re-render.

3. tests/test_styles_palette.py — Add 4 test entries verifying each VARIETY_DEFAULT_COLOR value clears 4.5:1 against PALETTE_LIGHT['BG_VIEWPORT'] (the existing palette-audit module's contrast helpers should cover this; if not, add the helper).

AI invariants:
- AI-13: 6-digit hex only (no #abc shorthand into PyVista).
- AI-12: WCAG 4.5:1 minimum for text (status bar surface name is text); 3:1 for non-text (surface itself).
- AI-9: no new processEvents(); the variety-switch callback already runs under the _computing guard.

Forward-compat for UPL-1 dark mode (next milestone): once this dict ships, UPL-1 will add a parallel VARIETY_DEFAULT_COLOR_DARK with key-identical entries tuned for the dark-mode panel background. Phase 1 researcher should propose where dark variants will fit (likely a styles.py constant alongside PALETTE_DARK placeholder) so this milestone's structure is forward-compatible.

V0 scope: per-variety colors apply on surface switch; do NOT persist user overrides across sessions (that's UPL-25). When the user picks K3 then overrides to red, then switches to Enriques and back to K3, K3 should re-seed from the family default, not the user's prior red override. This matches the simpler / less-state interpretation.

Validation: after implementation, .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q passes (must include the new palette-audit entries); manually verify by running app.py and switching varieties — each family shows a distinct surface color.
research_synthesis: Solo Sonnet researcher proposed 4 WCAG-verified hex values (K3 #8e9ed4 at 5.09:1, Enriques #c4a882 at 5.91:1, CY3 #85b5d0 at 6.07:1, Fano #8fbe85 at 6.29:1) — all clear the 4.5:1 text-contrast threshold against BG_VIEWPORT=#2f2f2f with comfortable margin. Hue separations >25 degrees pairwise. Unicode key risk surfaced: Calabi-Yau uses U+2013 en-dash and Fano 3-fold uses U+03C1 rho — keys must be copy-pasted from surfaces.py:946,950,968,986 verbatim, not retyped. Stub test at tests/test_styles_palette.py:133-138 must be REPLACED (asserts == {}); add 4 new test functions with luminance/ratio helpers extracted to module level. Wire set_default_color() on AppearancePanel + call from BOTH _on_variety_changed and _on_subtype_changed in app.py (researcher's preferred symmetric coverage). Forward-compat: add comment-only VARIETY_DEFAULT_COLOR_DARK hook for UPL-4; do not populate.
